　　Married to Medicine's hit franchise ventures to the Lone Star State for "Married to Medicine: Houston."Home to the largest medical community in the country, Houston provides the backdrop for a thriving group of physicians and wives of doctors looking to advance their medical careers and expand their enviable lifestyles.Married to Medicine Houston follows five dynamic women on...
